campaign_arc.arc_description: Start with pride (89%), build to appetite, close with warmth/gratitude

concept:
### 1. CONCEPT NAME
**"فخر الوطن" - "Pride of the Nation"**

### 2. CONCEPT DESCRIPTION
This campaign celebrates the founding day by connecting the essence of luxury living with Saudi heritage. It invites viewers to envision their dream home, a luxury villa by ROSHN that embodies both aspiration and pride in their roots.

### 3. VISUAL WORLD
The visuals will utilize a warm and inviting color palette, consisting of rich earth tones (deep golds, terracotta, and muted greens) complemented by luxurious textures like polished marble, soft fabrics, and natural woods. Lighting will be soft and ambient to create a serene atmosphere, while the outdoor scenes will incorporate natural daylight filtering through lush greenery to enhance the connection with nature and the outdoor lifestyle.

### 4. STORYBOARD
**Frame 1: [Opening hook — aspiration]**  
A wide shot of a sunrise over golden dunes, symbolizing a new beginning, with the tagline "Embrace the Essence of Luxury Living."

**Frame 2: [Build tension]**  
Close-ups of artisans crafting intricate details on a villa, emphasizing craftsmanship and attention to detail, while a voiceover narrates the blend of tradition and modern luxury.

**Frame 3: [Hero moment — product/brand reveal]**  
A grand reveal of the luxury villa, showcasing the sprawling architecture with lush landscaping, inviting viewers to step inside and explore a lifestyle of elegance and comfort.

**Frame 4: [Cultural connection — heritage/community]**  
Scenes of families gathering in a beautifully designed open space within the villa, interspersed with traditional music elements, celebrating Saudi culture and community life.

**Frame 5: [Close — call to action]**  
A serene sunset view of the villa with the text overlay "Join us in celebrating our roots with a home that reflects your aspirations." The final shot fades to the ROSHN logo with a website link.

### 5. CAPTION
"احتفل بأصالتك وجمال وطنك مع فيلا فاخرة من رُشْن. انطلق معنا في رحلة نحو المنزل المثالي! 🌟"

### 6. MOOD REFERENCE
The look and feel should be elegant and warm, inviting the audience into a sanctuary of luxury that feels both deeply rooted in heritage and modern in design.
